title: Opening for Medical Officer at Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital South Asia Partners
company: Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Opening for Medical Officer at Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Vijayawada operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital South Asia Partners:
Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital South Asia Partners!
